text: Managing a team effectively requires several key skills. Communication is essential; you must clearly explain tasks and expectations to everyone. Delegation means trusting your team members with responsibilities, not doing all the work yourself. Regular feedback helps others improve—praise good work and constructively discuss what can be better. Motivation keeps the team engaged, whether through recognition or shared goals. Finally, conflict resolution is crucial when disagreements arise. Listen to both sides, stay calm, and find a fair solution. Mastering these areas creates a productive, respectful, and positive work environment where everyone can succeed.
